calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-13-2005 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order,Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Oct-19-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's application for right to attach order: Off calendar in light of dismissal filed Sep-22-2005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Aug-29-2005 Off Calendar

Hearing On Plaintiffs' Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Sep-01-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Robert Charles Ward, Esq., for Plaintiff/Moving Party

Hearing Held. Tentative Ruling Adopted.
Plaintiffs' Application For Writ of Attachment is ordered off calendar as the notice was insufficient. C.C.P. Section 1013 requires a 16-day period of notice before the hearing which shall be increased by 20 days if the mailing is to a place of address outside the United States. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ex Parte Application For Right To Attach Order And For Protective Order
Off Calendar Jul-26-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert Charles Ward for plaintiff and moving party: Reiko Susuki

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. The ex parte application for a temporary protective order and writ of attachment is granted in part. A temporary protective order shall issue as to the real property identified in the application. Said temporary protective order shall remain in effect until September 3, 2005 so plaintiff may file a noticed application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
